unit.note: Server vitest 161 files / 1893 tests green (F0 gate, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local). Client vitest 202 files / 1969 tests green (unaffected — diff is server-only; run for AC3 assurance). tsc --noEmit clean (server build). The D06 changes touch server/src/external/transcript/routes.ts + server/src/core/session-watcher.ts and their vitest suites only.

integration.note: No separate integration harness. The transcript-poll state machine + sdk-sessions.json persist round-trip is covered by the server vitest route tests (recorded under unit).

e2e.note: Playwright 38-jsonl-missing-transition exercises the active->jsonl_missing flip for a NON-terminal task, which this change preserves (only terminal done/launch_failed rows gained immutability; a POST-created task is draft->active, never terminal). Not re-run in this server-only iterate — no client/production surface changed (detect_frontend_changes: has_frontend_changes=false). The preserved transition is fenced by the unchanged routes.transcript-newplain-* vitest suites (re-run green) + routes.test.ts active/jsonl_missing/awaiting cases.

surface_verification.justification: Server-only hardening: the diff touches server/src/external/transcript/routes.ts (transcript-poll state machine) + server/src/core/session-watcher.ts (JSONL discovery retry) + their vitest suites. detect_frontend_changes reports has_frontend_changes=false, so there is no startable frontend/UI surface this change alters and no browser-verify is applicable (F2 skipped by the shared detector). Correctness is proven by 5 RED-first server tests (RED on pre-fix main: done/launch_failed flipping to jsonl_missing + persisting, done resurrected to active, 3 persists per idle poll, findByUuid returning null on a one-shot EBUSY stat) that all pass after the fix, plus a throwaway real-fs round-trip probe (a done task with its JSONL deleted stayed done on a freshly reloaded on-disk store, store file byte-identical across 3 polls). No browser run was fabricated.

behaviors.behavior: AC1 - terminal states no longer resurrect: done/launch_failed stay put on poll (both missing- and ok-branch); a closed row is never yanked to active; idle/terminal polls no longer rewrite the store; a transient fs error in findByUuid discovery no longer yields an authoritative miss
behaviors.evidence: server/src/external/transcript/__tests__/routes.test.ts (D06 blocks) + server/src/core/session-watcher.test.ts (EBUSY retry). Real-fs probe confirmed the done-row disk round-trip.

behaviors.behavior: AC2 - a NEW regression proof is RED on pre-fix main and GREEN after
behaviors.evidence: 5 new tests proven RED on the pre-fix tree (captured: missing-branch done+launch_failed flip+persist; ok-branch done resurrected to 'active'; unchanged-mtime 3 persists; findByUuid null on one-shot EBUSY), all GREEN after the fix.

behaviors.behavior: AC3 - full server + client suites stay green (no invariant/ADR regressed)
behaviors.evidence: F0: server vitest 1893/1893 (SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local) + client vitest 1969/1969; server tsc --noEmit clean. CLAUDE.md rules 1-4/12 (read-only observer, stateless transcript, no JSONL writes) intact; the FR-01.32 draft-sticky + newplain state-machine fences re-run green.

behaviors.behavior: AC4 - files stay within the expected footprint; bloat baseline not ratcheted
behaviors.evidence: Only footprint files changed: transcript/routes.ts (188 LOC), transcript/__tests__/routes.test.ts (285), session-watcher.ts (299, held < 300 - no new crossing), session-watcher.test.ts (259). shipwright_bloat_baseline.json unchanged (no ratchet); none of the touched files are baselined.
